visual_description: A medium shot follows a young boy from behind as he walks through a dimly lit room. The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score that creates a palpable sense of dread and anticipation. The boy has shaggy, light-brown hair and is wearing a red sweater with green and white stripes on the sleeves. He holds a large, shiny kitchen knife in his hands, examining it intently. The room is furnished with a bookshelf filled with books to the left and a lit table lamp on a side table to the right, casting a warm, orange glow. In the background, a patterned curtain hangs, and a framed picture is visible on the wall. The camera pans smoothly, keeping the boy centered in the frame as he moves deeper into the room. A young boy's voice, low and hesitant, breaks the silence, speaking slowly and with a slightly distorted, almost menacing quality. He stammers, "Red... um..." as if carefully considering his words, adding to the unsettling and foreboding atmosphere. The camera continues to follow the boy as he approaches a television set on a wooden stand. The TV screen is on, but the image is out of focus. The boy stops, still holding the knife, and looks
